name: Pigtail U.fl Female / RPSMA Female 10cm
title: Pigtail U.fl Female / RPSMA Female 10cm
short_description: High Quality U.fl Female to RPSMA Female Low Loss Pigtail RG316 10cm
description: Pigtail U.fl Female / RPSMA Female 10cm (P-UF-RSF-10) is designed to provide a reliable connection between compact devices with U.fl connectors and external antennas or equipment using RPSMA interfaces. U.fl connectors are commonly found in small form-factor devices such as Wi-Fi modules, LTE modems, GPS receivers, and IoT hardware, while RPSMA connectors are widely used in professional antennas and networking equipment. With a practical length of 10 cm, this pigtail ensures minimal signal loss while offering just enough flexibility for installation in confined spaces. This makes it an excellent choice for both home users and professionals who require reliable signal transmission. Manufactured from high-quality materials, the pigtail provides long-lasting durability and consistent performance. The U.fl Female and RPSMA Female connectors ensure a secure and firm fit, minimizing the risk of accidental disconnections and guaranteeing stable operation even in demanding setups. The P-UF-RSF-10 is a versatile accessory that expands the compatibility of your networking and RF equipment. By enabling connections to high-gain or specialized external antennas, it helps enhance both signal reception and transmission for Wi-Fi, LTE, and other RF applications. This improvement in coverage and network stability makes it especially useful for wireless routers, access points, IoT devices, and custom projects. Its compact design ensures flexibility during installation while minimizing signal loss, providing dependable performance in a variety of scenarios. Whether you need better coverage at home, stronger connectivity for office use, or a reliable solution for professional setups, this pigtail offers a simple and effective way to upgrade your system.
